sentences.sentence: It can be hard to guess someone's exact age.
sentences.translation: 准确猜出一个人的年龄可能很难。
difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是后面的不定式。
someone's exact age 是 guess 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: A range of factors may leave marks on our appearance: how much sleep We've had - even the way we dress and our view of ourselves.
sentences.translation: 许多因素可能在我们的外表上留下痕迹：睡眠多少，甚至穿衣方式以及对自己的看法。

structure.text: may leave marks on our appearance
how much sleep We've had - even the way we dress and our view of ourselves

difficult_points: 冒号后列举 factors 的具体内容。
the way we dress 中 we dress 是省略关系词的定语从句；We've 的大写是源文异常。

sentences.sentence: The good news is that just as these factors can add years on to your appearance, it follows that they can also take years off.
sentences.translation: 好消息是，既然这些因素能让外表显老，那么它们也同样能让人显年轻。

structure.text: that just as these factors can add years on to your appearance
it follows that they can also take years off

difficult_points: that 从句说明 good news 的内容。
just as... it follows that... 表示由前一事实可推导出后一结论；they 指 these factors。

expressions.text: add years on to your appearance

sentences.sentence: We don't always have control over some of those social factors that can make us look younger, but there are other steps we can take to try to stop the ravages of age.
sentences.translation: 我们未必总能控制那些让人显年轻的社会因素，但还可以采取其他措施，尽量阻止岁月的侵蚀。

structure.text: We don't always have control over some of those social factors
that can make us look younger
but there are other steps we can take to try to stop the ravages of age

difficult_points: that 修饰 social factors；make us look 是宾语加省略 to 的不定式。
we can take 修饰 steps，to try... 表示采取措施的目的。

sentences.sentence: SOCIAL FACTORS
sentences.translation: 社会因素
difficult_points: 这是名词短语小节标题，不是完整句子。
全大写提示下文讨论影响外貌年龄的社会因素。

sentences.sentence: Last month, the University of Southern Denmark published a report, The Influence of
sentences.translation: 上个月，南丹麦大学发布了一份题为《……的影响》的报告（标题在下一段续接）。
difficult_points: The Influence of 是 report 的标题同位语。
标题因源数据分段而在介词 of 后中断，须与下一段开头连读。

sentences.sentence: Environmental Factors on Facial Ageing, which showed that how we live can affect how old we look.
sentences.translation: 《环境因素对面部衰老的影响》，该报告显示，我们的生活方式会影响外表看起来有多大年龄（本句承接上一段标题）。

structure.text: that how we live can affect how old we look

difficult_points: 句首是上一段报告标题的续接部分。
which 指整份 report；how we live 作从句主语，how old we look 作 affect 的宾语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 影响我们看起来的年龄

sentences.sentence: In it, 1,826 twins were photographed and then ten female nurses aged between 25-46 years were asked to guess how old the "models" were.
sentences.translation: 研究中，1,826名双胞胎接受了拍照，随后10名年龄在25至46岁之间的女护士被要求猜测这些“模特”的年龄。

structure.text: and then ten female nurses aged between 25-46 years were asked
to guess how old the "models" were

difficult_points: it 指该报告所述研究。
aged... 是过去分词短语修饰 nurses；how old... 是 guess 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: The results were intriguing.
sentences.translation: 研究结果耐人寻味。
difficult_points: results 指护士猜测年龄后得出的统计结果。
intriguing 表示结果引人兴趣、值得探究。

sentences.sentence: They showed that belonging to a high social class can make us look up to four years younger, and many other lifestyle factors were shown to affect the way we look.
sentences.translation: 结果显示，属于较高社会阶层可使人看起来年轻最多四岁，而许多其他生活方式因素也被证实会影响外貌。

structure.text: that belonging to a high social class can make us look up to four years younger
and many other lifestyle factors were shown to affect the way we look

difficult_points: They 指 The results；belonging... 是动名词短语作从句主语。
the way we look 中 we look 是省略关系词的定语从句。

expressions.text: belong to a high social class

sentences.sentence: Having children was found to make men look a full year younger, though it had no effect on women, and having four or more children cancelled out the benefit.
sentences.translation: 研究发现，有孩子会让男性看起来整整年轻一岁，尽管这对女性没有影响；而有四个或更多孩子则会抵消这种好处。

structure.text: Having children was found to make men look a full year younger
though it had no effect on women
and having four or more children cancelled out the benefit

difficult_points: Having children 是动名词短语作主语；was found to 是被动报告结构。
it 指 having children，the benefit 指让男性显年轻的效果。

sentences.sentence: Depression and sun exposure were the biggest factors in making you look old before your time.
sentences.translation: 抑郁和日晒是使人未老先衰的最大因素。

structure.text: in making you look old before your time

difficult_points: making you look 是动名词加宾语补足语结构。
before your time 在此指比正常年龄更早显老。

sentences.sentence: Depression added up to three and a half years to a woman's perceived age (and 2.4 years for men).
sentences.translation: 抑郁会让女性的感知年龄最多增加三岁半（男性则增加2.4岁）。

structure.text: added up to three and a half years

difficult_points: up to 表示最高程度。
perceived age 指别人根据外貌判断出的年龄；括号内省略 added。

sentences.sentence: Sun exposure piled on at least an extra year.
sentences.translation: 日晒至少会让人额外显老一岁。
difficult_points: pile on 在此比喻给外表年龄增加岁数。
at least 表示一岁是最低增加量。

sentences.sentence: Smoking put on six months for a woman and a year for a man.
sentences.translation: 吸烟会让女性显老六个月，让男性显老一年。

structure.text: six months for a woman and a year for a man

difficult_points: Smoking 是动名词作主语。
put on 在语境中指给感知年龄增加岁数，两个宾语部分形成男女对比。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, having a high BMI (body mass index) was found to take a whole year off for both men and women.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，研究发现，较高的 BMI（身体质量指数）会让男性和女性都看起来年轻整整一岁。

structure.text: having a high BMI (body mass index)
was found to take a whole year off

difficult_points: having... 是动名词短语作主语。
was found to 是被动报告结构；take a year off 指减少感知年龄。

sentences.sentence: "If you are not depressed, not a smoker and not too skinny, you are basically doing well," says Professor Kaare Christensen (married, three children, non-smoker), one of the report's authors.
sentences.translation: “如果你不抑郁、不吸烟，也不过于消瘦，基本上就做得不错。”报告作者之一卡勒·克里斯滕森教授（已婚、育有三个孩子、不吸烟）说。

structure.text: If you are not depressed, not a smoker and not too skinny
says Professor Kaare Christensen (married, three children, non-smoker)

difficult_points: If 后三个否定状态并列，共用主语 you。
引语后采用 says 加说话者的倒装语序；one of... 是教授的同位语。

sentences.sentence: Professor Christensen's report concluded that it was more dangerous for our health to look a year older, than to actually be a year older.
sentences.translation: 克里斯滕森教授的报告得出结论：看起来老一岁对健康造成的危险，比实际老一岁更大。

structure.text: that it was more dangerous for our health to look a year older, than to actually be a year older

difficult_points: that 从句中 it 是形式主语，to look... 是真正主语。
more dangerous... than... 比较“看起来老”与“实际年龄老”。

sentences.sentence: NUTRITION
sentences.translation: 营养
difficult_points: 这是单个名词构成的小节标题。
全大写表明下文转向饮食营养对外貌衰老的影响。

sentences.sentence: This is possibly the biggest change we can make fairly easily.
sentences.translation: 这可能是我们相对容易作出的最大改变。
difficult_points: This 指调整营养这一做法。
we can make... 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 change。

sentences.sentence: There are four main factors that prematurely age us: smoking, too much alcohol, lack of fresh fruit and vegetables, and insufficient protein intake.
sentences.translation: 有四个主要因素会使我们过早衰老：吸烟、饮酒过量、缺少新鲜果蔬以及蛋白质摄入不足。

structure.text: smoking, too much alcohol, lack of fresh fruit and vegetables, and insufficient protein intake

difficult_points: that 修饰 factors，age 在此作动词“使衰老”。
冒号后四项内容具体解释 four main factors。

sentences.sentence: You can immediately tell a smoker.
sentences.translation: 你一眼就能看出谁是吸烟者。
difficult_points: tell 在此不是“告诉”，而是辨认、看出。
immediately 强调吸烟造成的外貌特征十分明显。

sentences.sentence: It's not just the lines around the mouth and eyes, but smoking is dehydrating to the body.
sentences.translation: 问题不只在于嘴角和眼周的皱纹，吸烟还会使身体脱水。

structure.text: It's not just the lines around the mouth and eyes
but smoking is dehydrating to the body

difficult_points: not just... but... 表示影响不只一种。
is dehydrating 表示吸烟具有使身体脱水的作用。

sentences.sentence: Every time you inhale on a cigarette,you're taking toxins into the body which have to be diffused and detoxified by the liver and kidneys, and they're dependent on plenty of fresh water to carry toxins away.
sentences.translation: 每吸一口烟，你都会把毒素吸入体内；这些毒素必须由肝脏和肾脏分解并解毒，而这些器官需要大量清水才能把毒素带走。

structure.text: Every time you inhale on a cigarette
you're taking toxins into the body
which have to be diffused and detoxified by the liver and kidneys
and they're dependent on plenty of fresh water to carry toxins away

difficult_points: Every time 直接引导时间从句；cigarette,you're 缺空格是源文异常。
which 更自然地指 toxins；后一个 they 在语义上却指 liver and kidneys，源文指代跳转。

sentences.sentence: Most smokers don't drink anywhere near enough water.
sentences.translation: 大多数吸烟者喝的水都远远不够。
difficult_points: anywhere near 用在否定句中加强程度，表示远未达到。
enough 修饰不可数名词 water，位于名词之前。

sentences.sentence: The really big, quick fix, though, is eating more fresh fruit and vegetables.
sentences.translation: 不过，真正重大而见效快的办法是多吃新鲜水果和蔬菜。

structure.text: is eating more fresh fruit and vegetables

difficult_points: though 是插入的转折副词。
eating... 是动名词短语作表语，说明 quick fix 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: You can see if someone doesn't eat enough, or any, fresh fruit and veg in a minute.
sentences.translation: 你很快就能看出一个人是否没有吃够、甚至完全不吃新鲜果蔬。

structure.text: if someone doesn't eat enough, or any, fresh fruit and veg

difficult_points: if 在此引导宾语从句，表示“是否”。
enough, or any 用插入方式递进：不仅不足，甚至一点也不吃。

sentences.sentence: The skin lacks a freshness and translucency.
sentences.translation: 皮肤会缺乏清新感和通透感。
difficult_points: lack 是及物动词，后面直接接宾语，不用 of。
freshness 与 translucency 描述健康皮肤的光泽和通透。

sentences.sentence: This is because the skin is the last organ to benefit from the nutrients you eat- the likes of the brain, heart, and lungs all get first share.
sentences.translation: 这是因为皮肤是最后才从所摄取营养中获益的器官——大脑、心脏和肺等器官都会优先获得营养。

structure.text: This is because the skin is the last organ to benefit from the nutrients you eat
the likes of the brain, heart, and lungs all get first share

difficult_points: This 指皮肤缺乏清新和通透感；because 引出原因。
you eat 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 nutrients；破折号前缺空格是源文排版。

sentences.sentence: If someone's diet is lacking in fruit and veg, the skin will become dehydrated.
sentences.translation: 如果饮食中缺少水果和蔬菜，皮肤就会变得干燥缺水。

structure.text: If someone's diet is lacking in fruit and veg

difficult_points: If 引导真实条件状语从句。
be lacking in 表示缺少某种成分；become dehydrated 表示逐渐失水。

sentences.sentence: This is a sign that sufficient nutrients aren't being delivered, so from an anti-ageing point of view, it's important to have live, fresh food and raw food is vital.
sentences.translation: 这表明身体没有获得足够营养，因此从抗衰老角度看，食用鲜活食物很重要，生食也至关重要。

structure.text: that sufficient nutrients aren't being delivered
so from an anti-ageing point of view, it's important to have live, fresh food

difficult_points: that 从句说明 sign 的具体内容，使用进行时被动语态。
it 是形式主语，to have... 是真正主语。

expressions.text: from an anti-ageing point of view

sentences.sentence: If you have to cook, steaming will retain at least some of the vitamins and minerals.
sentences.translation: 如果必须烹饪，清蒸至少能保留一部分维生素和矿物质。

structure.text: will retain at least some of the vitamins and minerals

difficult_points: steaming 是动名词作主语，指蒸制这种方法。
at least some of 表示即使不能全部保留，也能保留一部分。

sentences.sentence: The other really important thing, and one we tend to miss out on in our diet-obsessed culture, is adequate intake of essential fatty acids (EFAs), from oily fish, nuts, and seeds.
sentences.translation: 另一个非常重要、却在迷恋节食的文化中常被忽略的事项，是从油性鱼类、坚果和种子中摄取足量必需脂肪酸（EFA）。

structure.text: and one we tend to miss out on in our diet-obsessed culture
is adequate intake of essential fatty acids (EFAs)
from oily fish, nuts, and seeds

difficult_points: one 指 thing，we tend to miss out on 是省略关系代词的定语从句。
from... 说明必需脂肪酸的食物来源。

sentences.sentence: EFAs are vital for prolonging life expectancy because every cell in the body has a phospholipid bilayer that protects it, but they also give the skin a dewy, "bouncy", youthful feel.
sentences.translation: 必需脂肪酸对延长预期寿命至关重要，因为人体每个细胞都有保护它的磷脂双分子层；同时，它们也能让皮肤呈现水润、富有弹性而年轻的质感。

structure.text: EFAs are vital for prolonging life expectancy
because every cell in the body has a phospholipid bilayer that protects it
but they also give the skin a dewy, "bouncy", youthful feel

difficult_points: that 修饰 phospholipid bilayer，it 指 every cell。
but 后 they 指 EFAs；give the skin a ... feel 是双宾语结构。

expressions.text: give the skin a youthful feel

sentences.sentence: One of the worst things you can do in terms of looking old is to go on a low-fat diet.
sentences.translation: 若从显老的角度来看，最糟糕的做法之一就是采用低脂饮食。

structure.text: One of the worst things you can do in terms of looking old
is to go on a low-fat diet

difficult_points: you can do 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 things。
to go on... 作表语；in terms of 限定“最糟糕”的评价角度。

sentences.sentence: Stress is another big one for adding years.
sentences.translation: 压力也是让人显老的另一大因素。
difficult_points: one 替代前文所说的 thing 或 factor。
adding years 指增加外表上的感知年龄。

sentences.sentence: We can help support the adrenal and thyroid glands, which take a hammering when we're stressed, by eating plenty of fresh vitamin C and magnesium for the adrenal glands; and iodine, selenium, zinc, and B vitamins to support the thyroid.
sentences.translation: 肾上腺和甲状腺在压力下会受到重创；我们可以摄取大量新鲜维生素C和镁来支持肾上腺，并摄取碘、硒、锌和B族维生素来支持甲状腺。

structure.text: We can help support the adrenal and thyroid glands
which take a hammering when we're stressed
by eating plenty of fresh vitamin C and magnesium for the adrenal glands
and iodine, selenium, zinc, and B vitamins to support the thyroid

difficult_points: which 指 adrenal and thyroid glands，when 引出受压状态。
by eating... 表示支持腺体的方法；分号后省略 eating。

sentences.sentence: EXERCISE
sentences.translation: 锻炼
difficult_points: 这是单个名词构成的小节标题。
全大写表示下文转向锻炼与衰老的关系。

sentences.sentence: We've come to think of exercise as a pure slimming pursuit and women tend to be rather scared of lifting weights, but building lean tissue through weight-bearing exercise is key to keeping the years at bay.
sentences.translation: 我们逐渐把锻炼视为单纯的减肥活动，女性也往往相当害怕举重；但通过负重锻炼增加瘦体组织，是延缓衰老的关键。

structure.text: We've come to think of exercise as a pure slimming pursuit
and women tend to be rather scared of lifting weights
but building lean tissue through weight-bearing exercise is key to keeping the years at bay

difficult_points: come to think of... as... 表示逐渐形成某种看法。
building... 是动名词短语作主语；keeping the years at bay 指延缓衰老。

sentences.sentence: Exercise can help reduce the effects of ageing by slowing down the decline of type II muscle fibres.
sentences.translation: 锻炼可以通过减缓Ⅱ型肌纤维的衰退，帮助降低衰老的影响。

structure.text: can help reduce the effects of ageing
by slowing down the decline of type II muscle fibres

difficult_points: help reduce 中 reduce 使用省略 to 的不定式。
by slowing down... 是方式状语，说明锻炼如何减轻衰老影响。

sentences.sentence: Generally, type I muscle fibres deal with aerobic activities and type II with anaerobic ones.
sentences.translation: 一般而言，Ⅰ型肌纤维负责有氧活动，Ⅱ型肌纤维则负责无氧活动。

structure.text: type I muscle fibres deal with aerobic activities
and type II with anaerobic ones

difficult_points: 第二分句省略重复的 muscle fibres deal。
ones 替代 activities，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: The type II responds to resistance work to improve muscle tone.
sentences.translation: Ⅱ型肌纤维会对抗阻训练作出反应，从而改善肌肉紧实度。
difficult_points: The type II 省略了 muscle fibres。
to improve... 表示抗阻训练所追求的目的或结果。

sentences.sentence: With ageing, there's a reduction in frequency, duration, and intensity of habitual activity: we generally move less.
sentences.translation: 随着衰老，日常活动的频率、持续时间和强度都会下降，也就是说，我们总体上动得更少。

structure.text: there's a reduction in frequency, duration, and intensity of habitual activity

difficult_points: With ageing 表示伴随年龄增长。
冒号后对 reduction 作通俗解释。

expressions.text: a reduction in frequency, duration, and intensity
expressions.meaning_zh: 频率、时长和强度的下降

sentences.sentence: So, these type II fibres deteriorate because they simply don't get enough stimuli.
sentences.translation: 因此，这些Ⅱ型肌纤维会退化，因为它们根本得不到足够刺激。

structure.text: because they simply don't get enough stimuli

difficult_points: So 承接活动减少的事实引出肌纤维退化结果。
they 指 type II fibres；because 从句解释退化原因。

sentences.sentence: SKIN CARE
sentences.translation: 皮肤护理
difficult_points: 这是名词短语构成的小节标题。
全大写表示下文转向护肤和外貌年龄。

sentences.sentence: Almost every skin cream promises to make you look younger.
sentences.translation: 几乎每一种护肤霜都宣称能让你看起来更年轻。
difficult_points: promise 在此拟人化地表示产品宣传声称。
make you look 是宾语加省略 to 的不定式补足语。

expressions.text: promise to make you look younger
expressions.meaning_zh: 宣称能让你看起来更年轻

sentences.sentence: It's a promise many are seduced by, but many end up disappointed.
sentences.translation: 这是一个令许多人心动的承诺，但很多人最终都会失望。
difficult_points: many are seduced by 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 promise。
end up 后接形容词 disappointed，表示最终处于失望状态。

sentences.sentence: The problem is not that products don't work, but starting too late, and then not spending enough money.
sentences.translation: 问题不在于产品无效，而在于开始护理太晚，之后投入的钱又不够。

structure.text: The problem is not that products don't work
but starting too late, and then not spending enough money

difficult_points: not... but... 对比否定的原因与真正原因。
starting 与 not spending 是两个并列动名词短语，作表语。

sentences.sentence: A lot of people skip good skin care until they think they need it, and by then it's actually too late.
sentences.translation: 很多人一直忽视良好的皮肤护理，直到觉得有需要时才开始，而到那时其实已经太晚了。

structure.text: A lot of people skip good skin care
until they think they need it
and by then it's actually too late

difficult_points: until 引导忽视护理持续到何时；think 后省略 that。
第一个 it 指 skin care，第二个 it 是表达时间太晚的形式主语。

sentences.sentence: In women, the skin around the eyes is the first to go, in men it's the hands.
sentences.translation: 女性最先显老的是眼周皮肤，男性则是双手。

structure.text: the skin around the eyes is the first to go

difficult_points: to go 在此指最先衰老或失去良好状态。
两个独立分句仅用逗号连接，是源文逗号拼接。

sentences.sentence: A good routine should start early because maintenance is much easier than repair.
sentences.translation: 良好的护理习惯应尽早开始，因为保养远比修复容易。

structure.text: A good routine should start early
because maintenance is much easier than repair

difficult_points: routine 指固定、持续的护肤流程。
much 修饰比较级 easier，加强 maintenance 与 repair 的差距。

sentences.sentence: Your skin also becomes more transparent as you get older, so you need to adapt your make-up and hair colour accordingly.
sentences.translation: 随着年龄增长，皮肤也会变得更透明，因此需要相应调整妆容和发色。

structure.text: Your skin also becomes more transparent
so you need to adapt your make-up and hair colour accordingly

difficult_points: as 表示随着年龄增长。
so 引出应对皮肤变化的结果性建议；accordingly 指依照这种变化。

sentences.sentence: Foundation should be lighter than you'd imagine, and sheerer, and if you want to cover grey, don't be tempted to go for a too-dark hair colour or block colour -highlights are kind.
sentences.translation: 粉底应比你想象的更浅、更轻薄；如果想遮盖白发，不要受诱惑选择过深或整片单一的发色——挑染会更显柔和。

structure.text: Foundation should be lighter than you'd imagine, and sheerer
and if you want to cover grey
don't be tempted to go for a too-dark hair colour or block colour

difficult_points: than you'd imagine 是比较从句；sheerer 与 lighter 并列。
be tempted to go for 表示禁不住想选择；highlights 指挑染，kind 指对外貌更友好。
colour -highlights 中破折号后缺空格是源文排版异常。

sentences.sentence: Don't forget to apply moisturiser around the back of the neck: It's the only bit of skin attached to a bone, so it's important that you look after it to avoid sagging.
sentences.translation: 别忘了在后颈周围涂抹保湿霜：这是唯一紧贴骨骼的一小片皮肤，因此好好护理、避免松弛很重要。

structure.text: Don't forget to apply moisturiser around the back of the neck
It's the only bit of skin attached to a bone
so it's important that you look after it to avoid sagging

difficult_points: attached to a bone 是过去分词短语，修饰 skin。
so 后 it 是形式主语，that 从句说明重要的具体内容；末尾 it 指颈后皮肤。
